name: /compliance-remove: --dry-run prints planned removal but does not modify the catalog or archive the folder
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/nist-ai-rmf && touch generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/nist-ai-rmf/x.yaml && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://nist.gov
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us-government
  applicable_to: [ai]
  identifier_scheme: nist
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --target "$PWD/generated-code-quality-standards" --force --dry-run && grep -q nist-ai-rmf .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && test -d generated-code-quality-standards/us-government/nist-ai-rmf && echo ok 1>&2
